name: io.github.labelgrid/labelgrid-mcp
description: Official LabelGrid MCP server — manage your music catalog, releases, analytics and distribution.

environmentVariables.name: LABELGRID_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Your LabelGrid API token. Create one in your dashboard under Profile → API Tokens. Without it the server starts in setup mode and walks you through creating one.

environmentVariables.name: LABELGRID_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL. Defaults to the production API.

environmentVariables.name: LABELGRID_ENABLE_WRITES
environmentVariables.description: Enable safe writes (create/update drafts, labels, artists, and similar). Enabled by default; set to false for read-only.

environmentVariables.name: LABELGRID_ENABLE_FULL_WRITES
environmentVariables.description: Enable full writes (distribution, takedowns, immutable uploads). Disabled by default; also requires LABELGRID_FULL_WRITES_ACK.

environmentVariables.name: LABELGRID_FULL_WRITES_ACK
environmentVariables.description: Must equal the exact acknowledgment sentence (see the README safety section) to arm full writes.

environmentVariables.name: LABELGRID_TOOLSETS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated subset of toolsets to expose (account, reference, catalog, releases, insights, finance, webhooks, distribution; pre-0.3.0 names are accepted as aliases). Defaults to all except webhooks, which must be named explicitly to enable.

environmentVariables.name: LABELGRID_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: Force reads only; overrides both write flags. Defaults to false.
